title: 3pcs Mini Christmas Tree 15/20/25cm White Frosted Artificial Christmas Trees Christmas Table Decorations Xmas Shelf Tabletop Decor 3 Sizes (C)
features: 【Package Include】You will receive 3 pcs (15cm/20cm/25cm) mini Christmas trees.The center of the tree is a thin wire.If the tree is bent,you can straighten it easily
【Features】Our white mini Christmas trees look beautiful with the frosted finish,adding a nice touch to a Christmas display,will be cute additions to your Christmas table decorations
【3 Sizes】Our mini Christmas tress come in 3 sizes,15cm/20cm/25cm,good size range
【Sturdy Material】These mini Christmas trees ornaments are well made of high quality plastic and natural wood,solid and sturdy. You can use them again next Christmas
【Christmas Table Decorations】You can use them to decorate your dining table for Christmas,you can also add these to your sideboard as part of winter/Christmas display
description: Package Include: 3 pcs mini Christmas trees to ready for your Christmas display. Tips:The center of the tree is a thin wire.If the tree is bent,you can straighten it easily.
